name: Cook, Michael
source_notes: Sy Scholfield quotes The Ceremonies on Twitter: ""ok so 21 years ago right about now little markypoo was born" (posted 11:53pm 12 Oct 2014) [https://twitter.com/theCEREMONIES/status/521554277135683584], "Wishing our brother Mark (Michael's is tomorrow... born before and after midnight) a spectacular 20th birthday!" (posted 12 Oct 2013) [https://twitter.com/theCEREMONIES/status/389189044048912384], "Matthew is 21, Mark and Michael are twins 19 (Mark is a few minutes older than Michael but are born on separate days.)" [https://twitter.com/theCEREMONIES/status/348012768659640320], "Mark is oct 12 and Michael oct 13 '93.. born before & after midnight~ Matthew is jun 29 '91" [https://twitter.com/theCEREMONIES/status/288791658949120000]. Full names and place from California Birth Index which lists both born on 13 Oct 1993. According to their official website, "Kane Michael and Mark’s birthdays are all in chronological order. Oct 11, 12, and 13" [http://www.theceremonies.com/about]. NB: Mark was born around 11:53pm on 12th so Michael was born a "few minutes" later at around 12:05am on 13th. \n
categories: Vocation : Entertain/Music : Vocalist/ Pop, Rock, etc.
